title: Phase 7A: Driver PWA infrastructure - service worker, manifest, offline sync
description: Build PWA infrastructure for the driver app: service worker for offline support with caching strategies, PWA manifest for installability, and offline data sync service for queuing and replaying mutations.
steps: Create public/sw.js with service worker implementing cache-first for assets, network-first for API
Implement offline queue for mutations (POD capture, stop completion, etc.)
Handle background sync when connection restored
Create public/manifest.json with PWA manifest (name, icons, theme color, display: standalone)
Create src/lib/services/offline-sync.ts with offline data sync service
Implement IndexedDB storage for offline data (route, stops, customer info)
Implement mutation queue with retry logic and conflict resolution
